title: Breakwave Tanker Report 9.9.2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 09/09/2025
VLCC Strength Continues on the Back of Solid Oil Flows - VLCC spot rates entered September on their strongest footing since
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2025-09-09_BreakwaveTankersSeptember92025Report.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/shipbuilding/pdfs/2025-09-09_BreakwaveTankersSeptember92025Report.pdf

[Page 1]
Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
September 9, 2025
• VLCC Strength Continues on the Back of Solid Oil Flows - VLCC spot rates
Short-term Indicators
entered September on their strongest footing since the earlier June surge, with
Momentum: Positive
uncovered third-decade stems in the East again driving heightened activity and
pushing AG-East rates higher. Chinese stockpiling continues to provide support, Sentiment: Positive
while charterers face resistance as owners maintain a firm stance amid a tightening Fundamentals: Positive
tonnage list. Rates for VLCCs moved sharply higher both East and West of Suez.
